fields.helpText: VistA site that takes the images associated   with a consult and captures them into the VistA system.
The parent site of an acquisition site.
Status of a site to read from an acquisition site. Active means images can be read. Inactive means images cannot be read.

The number of minutes a study can be locked by a user. After this period of time, a study that is still locked is automatically unlocked. If this field is undefined, the application will default to 180 minutes. Max value is 99999, no decimals allowed.
